# HPD.ML.Clustering

Generated from published HPD ML `0.5.0` packages.

## HPD-ML-Clustering

- [`ClusteringExtensions`](../types/hpd-ml-clustering-clusteringextensions.md) - Undocumented in the published XML file.
- [`ClusteringModelParameters`](../types/hpd-ml-clustering-clusteringmodelparameters.md) - Learned K-Means model: K centroids with precomputed norms. Distance computation uses: ||x - c||² = ||x||² - 2·dot(x, c) + ||c||²
- [`ClusteringScoringTransform`](../types/hpd-ml-clustering-clusteringscoringtransform.md) - Assigns each row a cluster ID and a distance vector to all centroids. Output: PredictedLabel (uint, 1-indexed), Score (float[K] distances).
- [`KMeansInitialization`](../types/hpd-ml-clustering-kmeansinitialization.md) - Initialization strategy for K-Means.
- [`KMeansLearner`](../types/hpd-ml-clustering-kmeanslearner.md) - Batch K-Means clustering via Lloyd's algorithm.
- [`KMeansOptions`](../types/hpd-ml-clustering-kmeansoptions.md) - Options for KMeansLearner.
- [`MiniBatchKMeansLearner`](../types/hpd-ml-clustering-minibatchkmeanslearner.md) - Mini-Batch K-Means (Sculley, 2010). Samples a mini-batch per iteration instead of full dataset passes.
- [`MiniBatchKMeansOptions`](../types/hpd-ml-clustering-minibatchkmeansoptions.md) - Options for MiniBatchKMeansLearner.
